summary: This IP initiated a standard GET request to the root path using a common browser user-agent, typical behavior for a basic web scanner probing for active services.
This IP performed a GET request to the root directory with an iPhone Safari user-agent, indicative of a scanner performing initial reconnaissance on a web service.

This IP attempted to access a common administrative configuration file (`/admin/config.php`) using a non-standard user-agent, suggesting an automated directory enumeration or vulnerability scanning attempt.
This IP is clearly identified as a Shodan scanner performing an internet-wide reconnaissance scan, indicated by its specific User-Agent string.
